title: Everything Falls
description: Makes all blocks affected by gravity — dig, chop, or explode with caution! Bedrock is the only thing keeping the world together
body:
Gravity Mod – Because gravity should be universal!

Tired of floating dirt blocks or unrealistic floating trees? This mod brings a whole new level of immersion to Minecraft by making all blocks behave like sand and gravel — falling when unsupported. Trees crash down, cliffs crumble, and caves get way more dangerous.

Features:

🌍 All blocks fall when not supported (except bedrock).

🛠️ Customizable gravity radius via /setgravityradius <number>.

🧱 Adds realism and challenge to mining, building, and exploring.

🧪 Fully client-side configurable with a powerful command.

⚙️ Selective gravity control using /allowblock <block_id> <true|false> — enable or disable gravity for specific blocks.

💥 Watch entire forests fall with one chop (satisfyingly chaotic).

⚠️ Warning: Use with caution — a single misstep could bring down a mountain.

🧭 Recommended Settings:
To make the game completable, i suggest running:

/allowblock end_portal_frame false

/allowblock obsidian false

/allowblock end_stone false

These commands disable gravity for essential blocks so you can build portals and survive the End dimension. Use at your discretion for a more balanced experience!

Created by Hreggi5, this mod redefines the laws of Minecraft physics.
Build smarter. Dig safer. Survive the collapse.


[![Available on CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available%20on-CurseForge-f16436?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/everything-falls)
